name: NatNarr 30 Pack Bow Cake Toppers Black Ribbon Bows for Cake Bow Cupcake Toppers Back to School Decorations Bow Birthday Decorations for Baby Shower, Wedding, Engagement, Bachelorette Party
bullets: Material: Black cake bows are made of high-quality polyester ribbon, not easy to deform or fade. Bow cake topper are handmade, smooth, shiny, lightweight and very durable.

Quantity: 30 pieces bow cake toppers, measuring approximately 2.9 x 5.7 inches. Can easily meet your various needs for cake decorations or DIY projects. Use your creativity to make fun and beautiful items with family and friends. (Tip: You can cut it shorter if the bow decoration on the cake or cupcake is too long.)

Easy to Use: Our bow party decorations are pre-tied, you can easily attach them to the cake or items you want to decorate, saving you time. Use these eye-catching cake decorations to add a touch of color to your party.

Applicable Occasions: Bow cake decorations are suitable for decorating cakes, cupcakes, desserts, ice cream, muffins, appetizers, fruits, party food, table decorations, etc. Can also be used to decorate gifts, packages and other items.

Multi-purpose Decorations: Our cake decorations are suitable for birthday parties, bachelor parties, engagement parties, anniversaries, baby showers, valentines day decorations, galentines day decorations, etc. Make your cake more attractive, these decorations will enhance the charm of your party.

reviews.name: Briii
reviews.title: Great purchase
reviews.body: Love this bows, I have used them to decorate a pink cake, decorated baby shower favors and balloons. They look so pretty, great value for your money and perfectly made.

reviews.name: Raquel
reviews.title: Cute and affordable. Great quality.
reviews.body: Super cute and affordable. Adds that extra touch to a cake.

reviews.name: Christina Yi
reviews.title: Great
reviews.body: Sage color was very pretty. Bows came sleek and good quality.

reviews.name: Kate McEwen
reviews.title: Super cute
reviews.body: So cute and a great length. Color is not too bold. Used them for a 4th of July cake.
